name: AITP OpenClaw Runtime
description: Expose typed AITP kernel entrypoints to OpenClaw and bundle the runtime skill surface.

aitpCommand.label: AITP Command
aitpCommand.help: Optional override for the aitp executable path. Leave unset to use `aitp` from PATH.

workspaceRoot.label: Workspace Root
workspaceRoot.help: Optional override for the target OpenClaw workspace root.

kernelRoot.label: Kernel Root
kernelRoot.help: Optional override for the AITP kernel root. Default: <workspace>/research/knowledge-hub.

timeoutMs.label: Command Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: Timeout for one bounded AITP command execution.
